headline: TikTok Shop Hits RM18 Billion Disrupting Malaysian E-Commerce
context: TikTok Shop generated RM18 billion in gross merchandise value in Malaysia in 2025 disrupting traditional e-commerce.

cards.big: TikTok Shop hit RM18 billion in Malaysian sales disrupting e-commerce
cards.sub: Live commerce and short video selling grew 120% creating new patterns

cards.big: 180,000 Malaysian sellers active with 45% being first-time online sellers
cards.sub: Low barriers enabled micro-entrepreneurs but raised product safety concerns

cards.big: Shopee Malaysia reported 15% revenue decline attributed to TikTok competition
cards.sub: Traditional platforms lobbied for equal regulatory treatment

cards.big: KPDNHEP recorded 3,200 complaints about product quality and refund failures
cards.sub: Consumer protection enforcement on social commerce technically challenging

cards.big: Social commerce tests whether consumer protection frameworks can adapt to new sales channels
RM18 billion TikTok Shop disrupts e-commerce. Platform marketplaces shift power from retailers to algorithms.
